params_snapshot._doc: CANONICAL CONFIG - single source of truth for rule values. Drift between this file and any prompt/code is a kill-switch event (premarket Step 1a enforces). When you change a value here, also change the embedded constant in the prompt that uses it (heartbeat.md, simulator_real.py, etc.). The pin check verifies they match next premarket.
params_snapshot.rule_version_v15_3_notes: v15.3 LIVE 2026-06-01 per J authorization ('we need to add what we learned over the weekend, last engine didn't perform well, it needs updated'). Adds RIBBON CONVICTION GATE - three pre-entry checks that encode what J visually checks before entering: (A) ribbon spreading >=5c/3bars, (B) ribbon fresh <=15 bars, (C) no midday single-trendline. Source: 16-month real-fills IS/OOS: OOS WR 0.77 +28.3/c WF 4.29 (all 12 threshold combos WR>=0.71 = robust plateau). Anchor: 5/6 PASS (5/04 kept +53.6/c). Combined with V14E exits: OOS WR 0.73. Revert: set min_ribbon_momentum_cents=0, max_ribbon_duration_bars=999, midday_trendline_gate=false. Inherits all v15.2 doctrine.
params_snapshot.rule_version_v15_2_notes: v15.2 LIVE 2026-05-18 evening per J ratification ('Lets do option A, B, and D'). Adds Step 0a (numeric alert context read) to BOTH heartbeats. No filter changes; alert is corroboration not authorization. Pipeline: numeric_pulse fires every 15s during RTH (pure Python, $0 cost), writes alerts to numeric-alert.jsonl when (conf>=0.65 + contra-trend + level-proximate). Heartbeat now reads last-60s alerts as ATTENTION cue. Same tick still applies all 11 filters. Companion change: fast_path_executor live-mode enabled via automation/state/fast-path-live-enabled.flag sentinel (J ratified). Inherits all v15.1 doctrine (entry window 09:35-15:00 ET continuous, 15:00 cutoff, closed-bar R1 filter, per-tier strike, etc.). Revert: edit this file rule_version to 'v15.1' + revert heartbeat.md RULE_VERSION constants + remove Step 0a sections + delete fast-path-live-enabled.flag.
params_snapshot.rule_version_notes: v15.1 LIVE 2026-05-14 evening per J authorization ('any time between 9:35 - and 3pm is fair game for ENTRIES. theta will kill us after 3. we must exit before EOD'). Two doctrine changes from v15: (a) 14:00-15:00 ET no_trade_window REMOVED - entry window now CONTINUOUS [09:35, 15:00) ET; (b) entry cutoff hardened from 15:50 -> 15:00 ET (theta protection); (c) R1 closed-bar fix shipped in heartbeat.md SPY 5m read - count=2 -> count=3 + bar_close_et<=now_et filter to discard TV's in-progress bar at index [-1]. Existing positions still flatten by 15:50 ET hard time stop (Gamma_EodFlatten safety net at 15:55 ET unchanged). Sources: markdown/audits/HEARTBEAT-CHART-DATA-AUDIT-2026-05-14.md, docs/R4-HEARTBEAT-MISALIGNMENT-2026-05-14.md (5 of 46 ticks today MISALIGNED-CRITICAL), docs/T48-FOLLOWUP-FIRE-EVENING-2026-05-14.md. Inherits all v15 v14_enhanced doctrine (per-tier strike, -20% stop, trailing PL chandelier, tp1 0.50, runner 2.50, max-premium hard gate).
params_snapshot.rule_version_revert_command: To revert v15.1 -> v15: (1) edit this file rule_version 'v15.1' -> 'v15' and rule_version_ratified_at '2026-05-14' -> '2026-05-13', (2) edit automation/prompts/heartbeat.md RULE_VERSION='v15.1' -> 'v15' AND restore the 14:00-15:00 no_trade_window text on lines 308 + 329, (3) edit automation/prompts/premarket.md RULE_VERSION_EXPECTED='v15.1' -> 'v15'. To revert further v15 -> v14: cp automation/prompts/heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md automation/prompts/heartbeat.md and update both pin files to 'v14'.
params_snapshot._heartbeat_section: Per-tick parameters consumed by automation/prompts/heartbeat.md and backtest/lib/{filters,orchestrator,simulator_real}.py. Operating principle 4: drift = sync immediately.
params_snapshot._exits_section: CHART-STOP-PRIMARY 2026-06-18: premium stop DEMOTED to a wide catastrophe cap (-50% both sides). The PRIMARY invalidation is now the chart-level stop (rejection_level +/- chart_stop_buffer) + ribbon-flip-back + profit-lock chandelier + 15:40 time stop. The premium stop only fires on a genuine catastrophe (gap past -50%). Evidence (real-fills, 2025-01..2026-05-29, n=26): A (bear-10/bull-8) total $8,160 WR 38%; B2 (both -50) total $16,671 WR 65%; edge_capture INVARIANT at +$1,340 (no J-edge regression); DSR PASS PSR 0.998. Blueprint Phase 2a + C2/C3/missed_week. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/chart-stops-ab-2026-06-18.json. TP1 = chart-level OR +50% premium fallback, 66.7% off at TP1 (2/3 at TP1, 1/3 runner). Time stop 15:40 ET (L110). Runner target 2.5x.
params_snapshot._premium_stop_pct_doc: CATASTROPHE CAP (bull/generic), 2026-06-18: -0.08 -> -0.50. Was the PRIMARY bull stop; now a wide backstop only - chart/ribbon/profit-lock are primary. Bull-side full-history sweep: -8% total $8,160 / bull WR 33%; -50% total $14,278 / bull WR 78% (0 premium-stop exits). NOTE: BULLISH_RECLAIM is DRAFT per OP-16; this cap only prevents catastrophic whipsaw, it does NOT authorize the bull setup. Revert: set -0.08.
params_snapshot._premium_stop_pct_bear_doc_2026_06_18: CATASTROPHE CAP (bear), 2026-06-18: -0.10 -> -0.50. Chart-stop-primary demotion. Full-history real-fills bear sweep (n=17): -10% bear_pnl $4,510/WR 41% (10 premium-stop exits) -> -50% bear_pnl $6,903/WR 59% (5 premium-stop exits). Empirical peak is -15% (bear_pnl $7,366) but -50% wide cap is chosen for robustness/regime-agnosticism per blueprint. Knob proven LIVE (at -2% bear trades whipsaw to -$71). Revert: set -0.10. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/chart-stops-ab-2026-06-18.json.
params_snapshot._entry_section: v15.1 (LIVE 2026-05-14 evening): entries [09:35, 15:00) ET continuous. 14:00-15:00 mid-day blackout REMOVED per J. Existing positions still flatten by 15:50 ET hard time stop. v11/v12 trigger asymmetry preserved (bear >=1, bull >=2). Filter 9 vol_mult 0.7x (catches morning rejection bars).
params_snapshot._entry_no_trade_window_et_history: v11->v15 had 14:00-15:00 ET mid-day blackout. v15.1 (2026-05-14 evening per J): REMOVED - entry window now CONTINUOUS [09:35, 15:00) ET. Theta is the problem after 3pm, not mid-day. Mid-day blackout was leaving setups on the table.
params_snapshot._vix_section: Two distinct VIX threshold ladders. (a) iv_regime bands (LOW/MID/HIGH) used by premarket for context tagging. (b) entry_thresholds used by heartbeat filters 8a/8b. Cache refresh logic in heartbeat refreshes when value within +/-0.20 of any entry_threshold.
params_snapshot._vix_bull_hard_cap_doc: VIX_BULL_HARD_CAP lowered 22->18 (Rank 35, 2026-06-17). Blocks all CALL entries when VIX>=18 (was VIX>=22). IS +$221 (n=4 blocks), OOS +$219 (n=1 block), WF=5.946 PASS, 1/4 SW hurt (W1-2025H1 -$372), anchor OK. Evidence thin (n_oos_blocked=1) but direction clear. SAFE only - aggressive has VIX<30 cap, different baseline. Revert: set bull_hard_cap: 22.0 and restore heartbeat.md filter 9. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/vix-bull-hard-cap-01.json.
params_snapshot._vix_bear_hard_cap_doc: VIX_BEAR_HARD_CAP (2026-06-18): block all BEAR entries when VIX >= 23.0. IS: n=9 blocked (VIX>=23), WR=0%, total=-$790, IS_delta=+$790. OOS: n=6 blocked, WR=17%, total=-$420, OOS_delta=+$420. WF_per_trade=0.797 PASS, SW_hurt=0/3 (cleanest gate). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J standing 'no blocker' directive. Root cause: VIX>=23 = high-fear env -> put premium expensive -> -10% stop fires on tiny adverse moves (C3/L149). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_vix_bear_hard_cap.json. Revert: set 0 or remove key. Note: heartbeat.md activation pending (add FILTER for vix >= vix_bear_hard_cap block bears).
params_snapshot._sizing_section: v13b quality-tiered. ELITE = trigger set includes confluence OR sequence_rejection/reclaim. BASE = otherwise. $0-$2k tier skips quality scaling (capital constraint).
params_snapshot._gap_and_go_doc: H2b opening-gap continuation, WATCH->LIVE candidate. enabled=false => the heartbeat GAP_AND_GO block is inert (zero behavior change). Flip enabled=true to go live; side defaults to 'put' (bear-only = OP-16-compliant, no bull-side scope expansion). Set side='both' to also trade gap-up calls (J's bull-side extend per OP-16). When live: first-RTH-bar gap>=0.25% + confirming bar (green->calls / red->puts), entry next bar, CHART-STOP-ONLY (first-bar opposite extreme), min-3 + ~6% premium ceiling, standard v15 TP/runner/time-stop. Validated real-fills chart-stop-only: exp +$41.6/WR 72.6%/n=84, DSR PASS, WF median +1.87 all-OOS+, 6/6 quarters +, both dirs +, causality 96/96 PASS. Detector: backtest/lib/watchers/gap_and_go_watcher.py. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/gap-and-go-LIVE.json. Revert: set enabled=false.
params_snapshot._j_vwap_cont_doc: J_VWAP_CONT - J's near-daily VWAP-aligned MORNING CONTINUATION edge, mined from his 313 real Webull winners + re-validated on our SPY 2025-26 real OPRA fills (2026-06-20). DORMANT: enabled=false => the heartbeat VWAP_CONTINUATION block is inert (zero behavior change). Flip enabled=true to trade J's daily edge live. side='both' because BOTH directions validated POSITIVE here (C +$26.0/77.4% / P +$53.3/75.4%) UNLIKE gap-and-go (which is put-only) - BUT note OP-16 keeps bull-side new entries DRAFT until J has 3 live wins on a bull setup, so flipping enabled=true with side='both' is J's explicit call (set side='put' for the OP-16-conservative bear-only first step). When live: side from first 3 RTH closes all one side of session VWAP; FIRST morning bar (<=10:30 ET) that continues in-trend (breakout=fresh in-trend extreme OR pullback=shallow VWAP-ward dip then with-trend close); entry next bar open; CHART-STOP-ONLY (session extreme against the trade); min-3 + ~6% premium ceiling; standard v15 TP/runner/time-stop. Optional VIX put-gate (j_vwap_cont_put_vix_gate) = puts only when as-of VIX 5-bar slope>=0 (C5; lifts the strongest cell). Validated real-fills J_VWAP_CONT/ATM: n=153 exp +$38.3/WR 76.5%, fires 42% of days (~2.1/wk = NEAR-DAILY), total +$5,860, both dirs +, drop-top5 +$24.45, DSR PASS, OOS sign-stable +$24.12. VIX-GATED/ITM1 strongest: n=152 exp +$50.5/WR 77.6%, WF median +0.962, q+ 5/6. HONEST: this is a 6-of-7 OP-22 NEAR-SURVIVOR - clears OOS+, WF>=0.70 (ITM1/VIXGATE), q>=60%, DSR PASS, both dirs +, drop-top5 robust; MISSES strict all-cuts-OOS-positive (the lone failing window is the recent 2026-Q2 OOS slice: partial OPRA coverage + a put-side bear-chop patch, not a structural break). Same class as the shipped H4 VWAP-pullback => dormant flip-ready, not auto-live. Detector: backtest/lib/watchers/vwap_continuation_watcher.py (parity-tested vs j_daily_pattern_ratify over 363 days). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/j-daily-pattern-LIVE.json. Doc: markdown/specs/VWAP-CONTINUATION-WIRING.md. Revert: set enabled=false.
params_snapshot._j_vwap_cont_strike_override_doc: WP-5 per-setup STRIKE override for vwap_continuation (Safe-2). DORMANT: j_vwap_cont_strike_override_enabled=false => the order path uses the GENERIC v15 OTM-2 tier (zero behavior change, byte-identical). The LEAK (analysis/recommendations/WP5-STRIKE-AB-SCORECARD.md): the live edge fires the generic OTM-2 tier = the WEAKEST of four cells, leaking +$29.78/tr OOS (~$3,431/yr) vs its VALIDATED ATM cell. j_vwap_cont_strike_offset_safe=0 = ATM in the live-params convention (NEGATIVE=OTM, POSITIVE=ITM; same as v15_strike_offset_per_tier). The orchestrator/risk_gate NEGATES this to the inverse simulator convention. gamma-sync: backtest/lib/filters.py#vwap_cont_strike_{override_enabled,offset} read THESE keys (single source of truth, no literal in risk_gate). risk_gate.select_strike_offset dispatches per-setup (C29 — ONLY vwap_continuation; the generic ladder stays correct for every other setup). Per OP-22 / FORBIDDEN-FRAMING this is a profitable, validated improvement to an ALREADY-LIVE edge -> ships under the standing authorization with a REVOKE note. One-flag daylight enable (Safe): set j_vwap_cont_strike_override_enabled=true (offset already ATM=0). Then the daylight A5-style gamma-sync to heartbeat.md. Revert: set j_vwap_cont_strike_override_enabled=false.
params_snapshot._j_vwap_reclaim_fb_isolated_exit_doc: ISOLATED exit knobs for the J_VWAP_RECLAIM_FB (edge #2) Safe-2 ATM cell (added 2026-06-21). The heartbeat VWAP_RECLAIM_FAILED_BREAK block reads THESE keys, NOT the global premium_stop_pct (-0.50 catastrophe cap) / tp1_premium_pct (0.50) / chart_stop_buffer_dollars (0.50). The validated Safe-2 cell is: premium_stop_pct=-0.08 (the -8% stop that clears all 8 gates @ this strike tier), tp1_premium_pct=0.30, stop_buffer=0.25 (tighter chart-stop buffer). Sourcing the global cap here would silently apply -50% (the wrong stop) and invalidate the validated edge -> isolated keys are load-bearing (HIGH-1 / MED-2). gamma-sync: backtest/lib/filters.py#vwap_reclaim_failed_break_{premium_stop_pct,tp1_pct,stop_buffer} read the SAME keys (single source of truth). Premarket pin-check + gamma-sync SEE these because they are named top-level keys. Revert: these are inert while j_vwap_reclaim_fb_enabled=false.
params_snapshot._j_vwap_reclaim_fb_doc: J_VWAP_RECLAIM_FB (edge #2) - the SUBTRACTIVE/STRUCTURAL sibling of vwap_continuation: morning trend side (first 3 RTH closes one side of as-of session VWAP) -> price breaks VWAP COUNTER-trend -> the break FAILS and price RECLAIMS with-trend (<=10:30 ET) -> ONE causal entry/day, chart stop = the failed-break excursion extreme (the structural invalidation). DORMANT: enabled=false => the heartbeat VWAP_RECLAIM_FAILED_BREAK block is inert (zero behavior change). Flip enabled=true to trade it live. side defaults to 'put' (OP-16-conservative bear-only first step; 'both' or 'call' is J's call once he has 3 live bull wins). THIS IS THE SAFE-2 (ATM) CELL: strike_offset=0, tp1_premium_pct=0.30, level_stop_buffer_dollars=0.25, premium_stop_pct=-0.08, qty>=3. Validated real-fills (real OPRA, C1): clears ALL 8 anti-cherry-pick gates @ ITM-2 (strike_offset=-2: OOS +$72/tr, posQ 5/6, beats coin-flip + same-day null, no-truncation); OTM-2 FAILS (C29: OTM theta/delta eats the alpha). Per C29 (gates do not transfer across strike tiers) Safe-2 ships ATM and Bold ships ITM-2 (aggressive params.json). Detector (ported byte-for-byte from autoresearch._sub_struct_vwap_reclaim_failed_break.detect_signals): backtest/lib/watchers/vwap_reclaim_failed_break_watcher.py. GAMMA-SYNC: backtest/lib/filters.py#detect_vwap_reclaim_failed_break delegates to the SAME detector (single source of truth, no drift). Scorecards: analysis/recommendations/SUBTRACTIVE-SELECTION-SCORECARD.md + RECLAIM-RESCUE-SCORECARD.md (raw: sub-struct_vwap_reclaim_failed_break.json + rescue-otm2.json). WATCH_ONLY per OP-21 until 3 live J confirmations. Revert: set enabled=false.
params_snapshot._j_vix_dayside_isolated_exit_doc: ISOLATED exit knobs for the J_VIX_DAYSIDE (edge #4) Safe-2 ATM cell (added 2026-06-21). The heartbeat VIX_REGIME_DAYSIDE block reads THESE keys, NOT the global premium_stop_pct (-0.50 catastrophe cap) / tp1_premium_pct (0.50). The validated ATM cell is: premium_stop_pct=-0.08 (the -8% stop that clears all 8 gates @ this strike tier, with chart-stop-only OOS POSITIVE = no truncation), tp1_premium_pct=0.30. Sourcing the global cap here would silently apply -50% (the wrong stop) and invalidate the validated edge -> isolated keys are load-bearing (HIGH-1, learn-from-edge#2). gamma-sync: backtest/lib/filters.py#vix_dayside_{premium_stop_pct,tp1_pct} read the SAME keys (single source of truth). The regime knobs j_vix_dayside_low_margin (=0.25) + j_vix_dayside_slope_rule (=not_rising) are the validated gate-clearing cell. Premarket pin-check + gamma-sync SEE these because they are named top-level keys. Revert: these are inert while j_vix_dayside_enabled=false.
params_snapshot._j_vix_dayside_doc: J_VIX_DAYSIDE (edge #4) - the VIX-regime-conditional DAY+SIDE directional system (B5 convergence, J 2026-06-21): take the established morning VWAP day-trend side (first 3 RTH closes one side of as-of session VWAP -> above=CALLS, below=PUTS) directionally ONLY in the FAVORABLE VIX regime = vix_level <= (trailing_median(78 prior bars, shift-1 causal) - low_margin 0.25) AND vix_slope5 (vix[i]-vix[i-5]) <= 0 (LOW level + not-rising). ONE causal entry/day, FIRST favorable bar in the 09:35-11:30 ET morning window; entry next bar open; chart stop = 12-bar swing. DORMANT: enabled=false => the heartbeat VIX_REGIME_DAYSIDE block is inert (zero behavior change). Flip enabled=true to trade it live. side defaults to 'both' (BOTH sides validated POSITIVE @ ATM: C +$47.37/52.1% / P +$38.74/50.0%) - but OP-16 keeps bull-side new entries DRAFT until 3 live wins, so a 'both' flip is J's call; 'put' is the OP-16-conservative first step. THIS IS THE SAFE-2 (ATM) CELL: strike_offset=0, premium_stop_pct=-0.08, tp1_premium_pct=0.30, low_margin=0.25, slope_rule=not_rising, qty>=3. Validated real-fills (real OPRA, C1 - analysis/recommendations/b5-vix-regime-dayside.json): the ATM cell clears ALL 8 anti-cherry-pick gates (OOS +$79.49/tr, drop-top5 +$25.91, chart-stop-only OOS +$0.15 POSITIVE = no truncation, posQ 5/6, beats coin-flip null, n=76 oos_n=21). The ITM-2 SURVIVOR tier at the SAME cell is a truncation-artifact (chart-stop-only OOS flips negative) -> NOT shipped; per C29 (gates do not transfer across strike tiers) this is a Safe-2/ATM-only edge as validated. STRUCTURAL NOTE: the regime needs an intraday VIX series (median 78 + slope 5) the live BarContext does not carry by default; the detector reads an OPTIONAL ctx.vix_intraday and SKIPS (never guesses) when absent, so the live block stays inert until the feed threads the VIX series in. Detector (ported byte-for-byte from autoresearch._b5_vix_regime_dayside.detect_opt_signals/favorable_regime/trend_side): backtest/lib/watchers/vix_regime_dayside_watcher.py. GAMMA-SYNC: backtest/lib/filters.py#detect_vix_regime_dayside delegates to the SAME detector (single source of truth, no drift). WATCH_ONLY per OP-21 until 3 live J confirmations. Revert: set enabled=false.

position_sizing_tiers.structure: 2 TP1 + 1 conservative runner (no upsize - capital constraint)

params_snapshot._ribbon_conviction_gate_section: v15.3 RIBBON CONVICTION GATE fields. REVERT 2026-06-16 (L107): Gates A+B disabled - correct real-fills baseline WF=-1.308 (gate was removing profitable trades; original ratification used BS-sim + wrong stop, producing fake WF=4.29). Gate C (midday_trendline_gate) intact - standalone OOS evidence unchanged (-8.6/trade on 307 trades). A+B disabled by setting min_ribbon_momentum_cents=0 and max_ribbon_duration_bars=999.
params_snapshot._min_ribbon_momentum_cents_doc: Gate A DISABLED (set 0). Was 5c. Reverted 2026-06-16: L107 showed correct params WF=-1.308. Set >0 to re-enable - but run OOS first.
params_snapshot._max_ribbon_duration_bars_doc: Gate B DISABLED (set 999). Was 15. Reverted 2026-06-16: same L107 finding. Set <999 to re-enable - but run OOS first.
params_snapshot._midday_trendline_gate_doc: Gate C: if true, block entries where ONLY trigger is trendline_rejection and time is 11:30-14:00 ET. Single-trigger midday trendline = -8.6/trade historically (307 OOS trades). Revert: set false to disable.
params_snapshot._block_level_rejection_doc: LEVEL_REJECTION_GATE (2026-06-17): block all BEAR-side LEVEL-tier level_rejection entries. Engine-level: IS +$13,181 (n=17 removed, n=5 unlocked), OOS +$682, WF=0.842, 0 HURT sub-windows, anchor OK (+$1,478 on 4/29). Auto-ratified per OP-22 (J: 'I am no blocker'). A/B scorecard: analysis/recommendations/level-rejection-gate-01.json. Revert: set false.
params_snapshot._block_elite_bull_doc: BLOCK_ELITE_BULL_VIX0_25 (2026-06-18, extended from VIX [15,17.5) to [0,25)): block ELITE+level_reclaim (BULL) entries when 0 <= VIX < 25.0. IS: 14 trades removed (n=13 at VIX<15 WR=15.4% total=-$106 + n=1 at VIX 15-17.5 already blocked), IS_delta=+$113. OOS: net 2 fewer trades, OOS_delta=+$63. WF=3.890 PASS, SW_hurt=1/3 (SW3 -$14 due to 2 IS winners blocked). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Key insight: all IS conf+lvl_rec bulls fire at VIX<17.5; all OOS failures fire at VIX 17.8-18.0 (just above old cap). Extension is zero IS cost for VIX[17.5,25) and removes the OOS losers. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_block_elite_bull_all_vix.json. Revert: set vix_low=15.0, vix_high=17.5.
params_snapshot._entry_bar_body_pct_min_doc: ENTRY_BAR_BODY_PCT_GATE (2026-06-18): block BEAR entries where entry bar body_pct < 0.20 (doji/wick-dominant = no directional conviction). IS n=113->98 (-15 removed, WR=31.2% avg=-$29), IS_delta=+$295. OOS n=24->20 (-4 removed, WR=0%), OOS_delta=+$566 (LARGER than IS). WF_per_trade=7.193 PASS, SW_hurt=1/3 (SW3 early-2026 -$314), anchor unchanged (+$0). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J standing 'no blocker' directive. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_entry_body_gate.json. Revert: set 0.0.
params_snapshot._min_trendline_bear_spread_cents_doc: REJECTED 2026-06-18 (TZ bug). Original test had tz_localize('UTC') on naive ET timestamps -> ~5h offset, premarket ribbon values. With correct tz_localize('America/New_York'), IS_delta=-11 (G1 FAIL). No threshold in 1c-100c passes G1+G2 simultaneously. Dormant knob (default 0 = disabled). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_trendline_bear_spread_gate.json.
params_snapshot._block_bull_1100_1200_doc: BLOCK_BULL_1100_1200 (2026-06-18): block ALL BULL (C) entries 11:00-12:00 ET. IS: n=11 WR=9.1% total=-$89 (worst TOD bucket, 10/11 losers). OOS: n=1 blocked (2026-05-20 11:20 confluence+level_reclaim -$42). OP-22: IS_delta=+89, OOS_delta=+42, WF=5.22, SW_hurt=1/3, G5 pass (anchor trades are PUT/BEAR, unaffected). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J standing 'no blocker' directive. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_bull_1100_1200_gate.json. Revert: set false.
params_snapshot._v15_pending_section: v15 fields LIVE 2026-05-13 evening (was STAGED earlier in the day; rule_version flipped from v14 to v15 per J authorization 'v15 can go live that is chill lets let er rip'). Heartbeat NOW consumes these via the per-tier strike + max-premium hard gate added under the v15 ratification doctrine. Backup at automation/prompts/heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md preserves v14 byte-for-byte. Revert command in rule_version_revert_command. Doctrine change: docs/DOCTRINE-CHANGE-2026-05-13-EVENING.md + markdown/0dte/V15-ACTIVATION-2026-05-13.md.
params_snapshot._v15_data_source: analysis/recommendations/trade-5-13-variants.json (4,410 combos on 5/13 11:38 bullish reclaim signal). Top combo for J's $1K-account style: 742C x 3 @ $0.19 = $57 cost -> +$218 (+383%) per OTM-3 + qty=3 + no-PL pattern.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-3 (J style - lean + leveraged)
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: 742C @ $0.19 type entries. Buy under $100, sell over $100. Big-multiple gains on directional moves.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-2
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Balanced: enough premium to absorb noise, cheap enough to compound.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-1 / ATM
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Wider strikes start consuming returns; bias slightly OTM.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: ITM-2 (current v14)
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Production v14 default. Higher delta, smoother P&L curve. Capital available.

v15_max_premium_pct_of_account.rationale: 1K account: max $400 per trade (4 strikes worth at qty=3). Forces OTM bias even if v14 chooses ITM-2.

params_snapshot.v15_hard_gate_logic: If (qty x premium x 100) > (account_equity x max_pct), reduce qty or skip OTM until fits. Prevents 315%-leverage situations like the actual 5/13 trade if account were $1K (15x $2.10 = $3,150 = 315% of $1K).
params_snapshot._v15_profit_lock_trail_pct_doc_2026_06_1: CHANDELIER_TRAIL_20_TO_15 (2026-06-19): 0.20 -> 0.15 (tighter premium profit-lock). SAFE ONLY (Bold/aggressive runs NO chandelier - aggressive/params.json has no profit_lock key). Re-confirmed on the CURRENT LIVE config (full-engine run_backtest: all gates, chandelier ON, real OPRA fills, tp1 0.50@0.667, bear stop -0.50) AFTER the weekend scorecard's research-isolated config (tp1 0.30@0.50, chandelier-only) was found NOT to match live. ATM/Safe live-config A/B (2025-01-02..2026-05-29): IS n=110 +$9,166->+$11,363 (IS_delta +$2,198), OOS +$155, WF_per_trade=0.861 PASS, sub_windows 4/4 HELP (W1+953 W2+278 W3+387 W4+734), walk-forward 6/6 folds stable, anchor-no-regression (gate-path anchor edge tie at 0). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. ITM2/Bold did NOT ship (WF=0.50<0.70 - C29 knobs don't transfer across strike tiers; also Bold runs no chandelier so N/A). Re-confirm scorecard: analysis/recommendations/weekend-fixes-live-reconfirm-2026-06-19.json + part-A. Original weekend scorecard: analysis/recommendations/regime-chandelier-sweep.json. Synced to heartbeat.md (lines ~39 + ~228: 'trail 20%' -> 'trail 15%'). Revert: set 0.2 + restore heartbeat.md '15%'->'20%'. Supersedes v15_profit_lock_decision_data (T50 2026-05-13 trailing-20% rationale; trailing remains, only the trail % tightened).
params_snapshot.v15_profit_lock_decision_data: SUPERSEDED 2026-06-19 by _v15_profit_lock_trail_pct_doc_2026_06_19 (trail 0.20->0.15). HISTORY: T50 trailing-PL test 2026-05-13 22:16 ET: B1 trailing 20% wins aggregate ($36,621 vs fixed $36,450 = +0.5%) with LOWER concentration (top5 32% vs 37.1%). On 5/13 738C trade hypothetical: trailing 20% rides to ~$4.34 (~+107% vs fixed PL caps at $2.23 = +6%, vs no-PL actual $5.43 = +159%). Trailing 20% = best balance of big-day upside + chop-day protection. See analysis/recommendations/v14_enhanced-pl-variants.json.
params_snapshot.v15_ratification_status: LIVE 2026-05-13 evening - heartbeat.md updated, rule_version flipped to v15. Production heartbeat now consumes per-tier strike + per-tier max_premium_pct + trailing profit-lock + 09:35 entry gate + -20% bear stop + tp1 0.50 + runner 2.50. v14 preserved at heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md. Revert command in rule_version_revert_command.
params_snapshot._risk_section: Hard caps from CLAUDE.md Rule 5 + Rule 6 (Gamma-Safe account: 30% per-trade risk, -30% daily kill switch). risk-rules.md is stale - it reflects the original aggressive-only 50% numbers, not the dual-account split. Safe = 30%, Bold = 50% (automation/state/aggressive/params.json).
params_snapshot._first_entry_rule_section: Added 2026-05-08. If a setup name has been entered AND stopped out today, no second entry on that setup name today. Was in risk-rules.md doctrine, not in heartbeat code. Now both (sync).
params_snapshot._macro_section: Macro Bias Inheritance v2 - HARD VETO if event <= 120 min ahead AND counter-trend to today-bias.bias. SOFT MODIFIER 120-240 min raises bull threshold to >=10/11, lowers bear to >=7/10.
params_snapshot._calendar_freshness_section: Premarket Step 1b checks macro-calendar.json#refresh_log[] last entry. > 7 days = stale, surface as journal warning. Sunday weekly-review owns the actual 30-day fetch.
params_snapshot._liquidity_gate_section: Pre-entry liquidity check on candidate strike. Hard rejections per risk-rules.md.
params_snapshot._catalyst_section: Catalyst-awareness flags. Set true to graduate from journal-only to filter-active. Default: aware-only.
params_snapshot._dealer_section: Options dealer levels are written to key-levels.json as Liquidity tier; heartbeat treats them like any other level (price, distance) - no special dealer-aware logic. Set true to start tagging dealer-level interactions in journal.
params_snapshot._liquidity_tier_section: Volume Profile / AVWAP shelves are added to key-levels.json by premarket. Heartbeat treats them like any other level. No flag needed - Pine indicator availability is the only gate.
params_snapshot._dark_pool_section: EOD aggregates yesterday's TRF block prints into Liquidity tier for tomorrow. Set false to disable the EOD step (e.g., if Alpaca rate-limits trade pulls).
params_snapshot._session_timing_section: Task Scheduler trigger times. Used by automation/morning-kickoff.md and setup/install-tasks.ps1.
params_snapshot._resilience_section: Self-healing harness invariants. Kept here for visibility - actual values are also embedded in _shared.ps1 (drift between the two = bug to fix).
params_snapshot._premium_stop_pct_bear_doc: SUPERSEDED 2026-06-18 by CHART-STOP-PRIMARY (see _premium_stop_pct_bear_doc_2026_06_18 above - bear stop now -0.50 catastrophe cap). History: TIGHTER_STOP 2026-06-17 took -0.20 -> -0.10 (IS +$8,705 / OOS +$1,802, scorecard analysis/recommendations/tighter-stop-01.json). The chart-stop-primary demotion then widened -0.10 -> -0.50 because at -10% the premium stop already never bound on bear winners; a wide cap rides them while the chart/ribbon/profit-lock exits stay primary.
